message:
refactor(func): adapt all function registry modules to Arc<str>/Arc<[u8]> SqliteValue

Mechanical migration of the function registry crate (7 source files)
to the new Arc-backed SqliteValue::Text/Blob variants:

- builtins.rs: char, concat, concat_ws, hex, lower, upper, trim,
  ltrim, rtrim, typeof, replace, randomblob, zeroblob, quote, unhex,
  substr (text+blob), soundex, sqlite_version, sqlite_source_id,
  compile_option_get, unistr, format — all return Arc::from() instead
  of owned String/Vec. Blob iteration uses b.iter()/b.to_vec().
  Test assertions updated throughout (~80 sites).
- agg_builtins.rs: group_concat finalize and test helper text()
  use .into() for Arc conversion
- datetime.rs: date/time/datetime function returns adapted
- lib.rs: function registry construction adapted
- math.rs: math function returns adapted
- scalar.rs: generic scalar dispatch adapted
- vtab.rs: virtual table function returns adapted
- window_builtins.rs: window function returns adapted

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
